codeReview.summary: The follow-up commit closes the prior scrutiny gap by extending the zero-live completed-boot app test to hit `/coins/markets` and `/coins/{id}` in the same scenario as `/simple/price` and `/diagnostics/runtime`, and it asserts the route-specific envelopes required by the trust-slice contract.

summary: Reviewed the prior failed review, the worker transcript skeleton, handoff, and commit `a66d783`. The current branch state now exercises zero-live completed-boot end-to-end across `/simple/price`, `/coins/markets`, `/coins/{id}`, and `/diagnostics/runtime`, with explicit assertions that markets returns a bitcoin row with nulled market-bearing fields and detail preserves the metadata shell with `market_data: null`, so the missing cross-surface zero-live coverage gap is closed.
